Convergence of Random Variables

19 Apr 2024 in Stat

1. Almost sure Convergence

  • Definition : \(P\left(\displaystyle\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} X_n=X\right)=1\)
  • pass

2. Convergence in Probability

  • Definition : \(\displaystyle\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} P\left(\left\vert X_n-X\right\vert \geq \epsilon\right)=0\)
  • Notation : \(X_n \xrightarrow{p} X\)
  • Convergence in Probabilityк°Җ Almost sure ConvergenceлҘј мқҳлҜён•ҳм§ҖлҠ” м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.

2.1. Weak Law of Large Numbers (WLLN)

  • Let \(X, X_1, X_2, \ldots\) be a sequence of independent, identically distributed (i.i.d.) random variables with \(\operatorname{Var}[X]=\sigma^2<\infty\). Then \(\bar{X}_n:=\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n X_i \xrightarrow{p} \mathbb{E}[X]\)

Proof

  • By ChebyshevвҖҷs inequality, \(P\left(\left\vert \bar{X}_n-\mathbb{E}[X]\right\vert \geq \epsilon\right) \leq \frac{\sigma^2}{n \epsilon^2}\)

  • This in turn implies that, \(\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} P\left(\left\vert \bar{X}_n-\mathbb{E}[X]\right\vert \geq \epsilon\right)=0,\)

  • мӮ¬мӢӨ finite variance \(\operatorname{Var}[X]=\sigma^2<\infty\)вҖӢ к°Җм • м—ҶмқҙлҸ„ мҰқлӘ…н•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ. (only finite first moment)
  • (skip the proof)

2.2. Strong Law of Large Numbers

  • Let \(X_1, X_2, \ldots\) be pairwise independent identically distributed random variables with \(\mathbb{E}\left[\left\vert X_i\right\vert \right]<\infty\). Let \(\mathbb{E}\left[X_i\right]=\mu\). Then \(\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n X_i \xrightarrow{a . s .} \mu \quad \text { as } n \rightarrow \infty .\)

Consistency

  • Estimatorк°Җ convergence in Probabilityмқҙл©ҙ Consistentн•ҳлӢӨ.
  • Estimatorмқҳ л¶„мӮ°мқҙ 0мңјлЎң мҲҳл ҙн•ҳл©ҙ Consistentн•ҳлӢӨ.

3. Convergence in Quadratic mean

  • Definition : \(\mathbb{E}\left[\left(X_n-X\right)^2\right] \rightarrow 0\)
  • Notation : \(X_n \xrightarrow{q m} X\)
  • \(b>a\)мқј л•Ң, \(\mathbb{E}\left[\left(X_n-X\right)^b\right] \rightarrow 0\)мқҙл©ҙ \(\mathbb{E}\left[\left(X_n-X\right)^a\right] \rightarrow 0\) мқҙлӢӨ.

4. Convergence in Distribution

  • Definitnion : \(\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} F_{X_n}(t)=F_X(t), \text { for all points } t \text { where the } \mathrm{CDF} F_X \text { is continuous. }\)
  • Notation : \(X_n \xrightarrow{d} X\)
  • Target CDF \(F_X\)вҖӢвҖӢк°Җ continuousн•ң pointsм—җм„ңл§Ң ! к°ҷмңјл©ҙ лҗңлӢӨ.
    • л§Ңм•Ҫ limiting distributionмқҙ лӘЁл“  \(x\)м—җм„ң continuousлқјл©ҙ, лӘЁл“  \(x\)вҖӢм—җм„ң Convergence in DistributionмқҙлӢӨ. (PolyaвҖҷs theorem)
  • Convergence in DistributionмқҖ Convergence in ProabilityлҘј implyн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
    • Ex. \(X, X_1, \ldots, X_n \stackrel{\text { i.i.d. }}{\sim} N(0,1) \text {мқҙл©ҙ} X_n \xrightarrow{d} X\)мқҙлӢӨ.
    • However, since \(X_n-X \sim N(0,2)\)
    • \(P\left(\left\vert X_n-X\right\vert>\epsilon\right)=2 P(X \leq-\epsilon / \sqrt{2})\)вҖӢлҠ” 0мңјлЎң мҲҳл ҙн•ҳм§Җ м•ҠлҠ”лӢӨ.
    • л§Ңм•Ҫ \(X_n\)мқҙ constantмқҙл©ҙ Convergence in Distributionмқҙ Convergence in ProbabilityлҘј implyн•ңлӢӨ.

4.1. PolyaвҖҷs theorem

  • Suppose that \(X_n \xrightarrow{d} X\) for a random variable \(X\) with a continuous distribution function. Then \(\sup _{x \in \mathbb{R}}\left\vert P\left(X_n \leq x\right)-P(X \leq x)\right\vert \rightarrow 0\)

  • Proof

    • By the continuity, \(-\infty=x_0<x_1<\cdots<x_k=\infty \text { with } F\left(x_i\right)=i / k\)к°Җ мЎҙмһ¬н•ҳкі 
    • \(x_{i-1} \leq x \leq x_i\)м—җ лҢҖн•ҙ \(F_n(x_{i-1}) \leq F_n(x) \leq F_n(x_i)\)мқҙкі  \(F(x_{i-1}) \leq F(x) \leq F(x_i)\)мқҙлҜҖлЎң
    • \(\begin{aligned} F_n(x)-F(x) & \leq F_n\left(x_i\right)-F\left(x_{i-1}\right)=F_n\left(x_i\right)-F\left(x_i\right)+1 / k \\ & \geq F_n\left(x_{i-1}\right)-F\left(x_i\right)=F_n\left(x_{i-1}\right)-F\left(x_{i-1}\right)-1 / k \end{aligned}\)вҖӢмқҙкі ,
    • \(\left\vert F_n(x)-F(x)\right\vert \text { мқҳ upper boundк°Җ } \sup _i\left\vert F_n\left(x_i\right)-F\left(x_i\right)\right\vert +1 / k\)мқҙлӢӨ.
    • \(k\)лҠ” arbitrary fixed numberмқҙлҜҖлЎң \(n \to \infty\)мқј л•Ң upper boundк°Җ 0мқҙ лҗңлӢӨ.

4.2. LeМҒvyвҖҷs continuity theorem

  • Let \(X_n\) and \(X\) be random vectors in \(\mathbb{R}^d\). Then \(X_n \xrightarrow{d} X\) if and only if \(\lim _{n \rightarrow \infty} \mathbb{E}\left[e^{i t^{\top} X_n}\right]=\mathbb{E}\left[e^{i t^{\top} X}\right]\) for every \(t \in \mathbb{R}^d\)вҖӢвҖӢ
  • \(X_n\)мқҙ \(X\)лЎң Convergence in Distributionн•ҳлҠ” кІғмқҖ characteristic functionsмқҳ мҲҳл ҙкіј к°ҷлӢӨ.
  • CrameМҒrвҖ“Wold device : highier-dim problemмқ„ one-dim problemмңјлЎң мғқк°Ғн•  мҲҳ мһҲлӢӨ.
